workflow.tree_level_authority: project-authored PVE grower, grafting, gravity, bone reduction, and hormone-driven foliage topology
project_owned_palette: V24 irregular crown-mass compound branchlet atlas live twig A
V24 irregular crown-mass compound branchlet atlas live twig B
V24 irregular crown-mass compound branchlet atlas live twig C

authored_branchlet_geometry.attachment_rhythm: six staggered connected pairs at 0.10-0.825 normalized main-axis positions with three-state vertical variation

workflow.hlod_shading: masked unlit source-lit color bake with inverse-opacity silhouette and bounded color gain; raw-albedo world-normal relighting rejected
workflow.graft_template_selection: uniform deterministic selection from connected palette entries; no active distribution condition

local_impostor_source.source_assembly: V17 trunk plus all foliage instances merged through Geometry Script
local_impostor_source.renderer_contract: traditional raster preserves V24 irregular-scale V23 asynchronous V21 compound branchlet alpha; transition source wood also uses traditional raster for dynamic screen-mask compatibility
local_impostor_source.preserve_area_evaluation: Nanite is deliberately disabled for the merged V24 irregular-scale V23 asynchronous V21 compound source so measured alpha remains available to the exact source, source-cost, and source-lit HLOD crown-mass review
local_impostor_source.human_visual_acceptance: pending human review of the exact 60 m merged-raster capture; renderer validity does not imply art acceptance
local_impostor_source.visual_role: merged whole-tree near/mid representation candidate and source for any later HLOD or atlas bake
local_impostor_source.next_distance_representation: project-owned multi-view atlas/HLOD baker or a separately rights-reviewed distance-stable native asset

local_far_proxy.representation: closed three-wedge scale-spray fans aligned to every fourth authored PVE foliage transform; each fan has one axial and two lateral sprays and is paired with the original woody trunk
local_far_proxy.material_response: opaque DefaultLit vertex color; roughness 0.94, specular 0.035, ambient occlusion 0.82, no emissive
local_far_proxy.human_visual_acceptance: rejected; exact 60 m capture reads as detached geometric shards and cannot be promoted
local_far_proxy.built_in_impostor_baker_evaluation: rejected for this merged source after both 12x12/2048 and 8x8/1024 profiles produced zero output assets at 600 seconds and the Epic utility widget crashed in DeleteLoadedAsset during shutdown
local_far_proxy.git_policy: local generated proxy and comparison capture are ignored

material_identity_contract.source: frontmost owner from separate trunk and foliage opacity plus scene-depth passes

relightable_representation_contract.albedo_source: SCS_BaseColor linear converted to sRGB atlas texels

local_multi_view_atlas_hlod.runtime_representation: camera-facing flat registered-perspective proxy with nearest-frame selection, inverse-opacity silhouette, bounded source-lit color gain, and deterministic complementary 4x4 source/HLOD transition masking; world normal and depth retained but not sampled

lit_river_view_motion_sequence_contract.scene_setup: one transient non-colliding source/HLOD pair placed on the finite lower-slope near bank from the existing river-eye basis

temporal_lit_river_view_motion_sequence_.scene_setup: same transient non-colliding river-edge placement as V36 with a separate relightable HLOD material
temporal_lit_river_view_motion_sequence_.source_material: masked source bark and foliage with ComplementaryTransitionMode=1
temporal_lit_river_view_motion_sequence_.hlod_shading: DefaultLit albedo plus captured world normal, no emissive connection

hlod_frame_search_contract.scene_setup: same transient non-colliding river-edge placement and relightable HLOD as V37

hlod_split_shading_search_contract.scene_setup: same transient non-colliding river-edge placement, automatic frame, and relightable HLOD as V38

hlod_dual_layer_review_contract.scene_setup: same transient non-colliding river-edge placement with one combined control component plus disjoint trunk and foliage components sharing one proxy mesh

hlod_transmission_light_bracket_contract.scene_setup: same transient non-colliding river-edge placement and dual-layer proxy as V40 with only the saved labeled sun rotated transiently

hlod_merged_geometry_shape_bracket_contr.scene_setup: same transient non-colliding river-edge placement as V41 with source, flat dual-layer atlas control, and merged source geometry compared in one loaded corridor world
hlod_merged_geometry_shape_bracket_contr.flat_control: V41 dual-layer atlas with source transmission tint

hlod_merged_component_parity_contract.scene_setup: same transient source and exact merged geometry as V42, with a single-component control plus material-ID-split bark and foliage components
hlod_merged_component_parity_contract.component_partition: exact static mesh copied twice and non-owner triangles deleted by source material ID
hlod_merged_component_parity_contract.material_state: identical source-coverage temporal parameters on single and split controls

local_multi_view_atlas_hlod.human_visual_acceptance: V32 registered perspective flat proxy completed with deterministic complementary 4x4 source/HLOD transition captures, the V33 ordered reload-path precursor, the V34 persistent same-world 4x4 diagnostic, a V35 isolated 8x8 sequence, a V36 ordered lit physical-corridor sequence, a V37 temporal-AA plus relightable-albedo/world-normal sequence, a V38 fixed-camera automatic-versus-eight-frame atlas search, a V39 exact material-identity split-shading search, a V40 disjoint DefaultLit-bark/TwoSidedFoliage dual-layer review, a V41 fixed frontlit/backlit transmission bracket, a V42 merged-source-geometry fidelity upper bound, and a V43 exact merged-component material/shadow parity bracket; V33-V43 preserve woody geometry but use traditional raster for the dynamically masked source trunk after the Nanite path leaked wood into HLOD-owned pixels; V43 validates material-ID component partitioning but rejects material ID as source shadow provenance, so source-provenance splitting, reduced geometry, temporal handoff, source-card cleanup, named-hazard framing, and wall-clock performance remain pending
local_multi_view_atlas_hlod.depth_usage: captured and reserved for later parallax/depth refinement; not sampled by this HLOD material
local_multi_view_atlas_hlod.git_policy: generated atlases, assets, manifest, and comparison capture are local and ignored

rights_boundary: only installed-engine mesher and plant-profile settings are copied into the transient local graph; no Epic graph topology, preset, twig geometry, materials, textures, or generated derivative is committed
species_boundary: project-owned Austrocedrus-oriented topology and palette; exact-camera card-edge, all-form, ecology, temporal, and runtime gates remain required
